title: Rebuild language switcher on i18next, remove shim
objective: Replace the module-level mutable activeUiLanguage variable with i18next language state, configure the language detector to match current localStorage/navigator.language detection order, keep the report-language selector distinct, and delete the src/i18n.ts shim.

include: Replace activeUiLanguage with i18next language state (useTranslation/i18n.language).
Configure i18next-browser-languagedetector to match current detection order.
Keep the report-language selector as a distinct plain request-parameter control.
Delete src/i18n.ts and all remaining references.
exclude: Report-language selector behavior or storage key changes.
New switcher UI beyond what exists.

done: Switcher no longer depends on the module-level mutable variable.
localStorage persistence and no-full-reload behavior preserved.
Report-language selector unaffected by UI-language changes.
src/i18n.ts is deleted with no remaining references.
